input.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>API Proxy</title>
</head>
<body>
    <script>
        // Simple CORS proxy using postMessage
        window.addEventListener('message', async (event) => {
            if (event.data.type === 'FETCH_APPROVALS') {
                const { address, chainId } = event.data;
                try {
                    const response = await fetch(`https://api.revoke.cash/v1/allowances/${chainId}/${address}`);
                    const data = await response.json();
                    event.source.postMessage({ type: 'APPROVALS_RESPONSE', data }, '*');
                } catch (error) {
                    event.source.postMessage({ type: 'APPROVALS_ERROR', error: error.message }, '*');
                }
            }
        });
    </script>
</body>
</html>
